Component.Name: PickListEdit
Component.Caption: C(PickListStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLPickLists( PROPERTIES(PickListId, DerStatusFormatted, CustNum, Whse) FILTER(Status <> 'O' and Status<> 'S')ORDERBY(PickListId DESC))

Component.Name: ShipmentIDEdit
Component.Caption: C(ShipmentIDStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDMC SLShipments.GetShipmentListSp( V(lsm1_ShipmentIDEdit) PROPERTIES(ShipmentId, DerStatusFormatted, CadName, CustSeq) DISTINCT() ORDERBY(ShipmentId, PickListId))

EventHandler.Name: GeneratePackage
EventHandler.Response: SLShipmentPackages.ValidateShipmentPackageSp( PARMS(VAR C(ShipmentIDEdit), VAR C(ShipmentPackagePackageEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GeneratePackage
EventHandler.Response: SLShipmentSeqs.GeneratePackageSp( PARMS(VAR C(ProcessIdEdit), VAR V(QtyVar), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GeneratePackagePackage
EventHandler.Response: SLShipmentPackages.GeneratePackagePackageSp( PARMS(VAR C(ProcessIdEdit), VAR C(ShipmentPackagePackageEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: ItemwhseCheckCntInProc
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemWhses.ItemwhseCheckCntInProcSp( PARMS(VAR P(Whse), VAR V(Item), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR, RVAR, RVAR P(), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, MESSAGE, RVAR V(CntInProcPrompt), RVAR V(CntInProcPromptButtons)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: Process
EventHandler.Response: SLShipmentSeqs.PackConfirmationCompleteSp( PARMS(VAR C(ShipmentIDEdit), VAR C(ShipmentLocationEdit), VAR C(QtyPackagesEdit), VAR C(ShipmentWeightEdit), VAR C(ShipmentWeightUMEdit), VAR C(ShipmentPackerEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ProcessAddShipment
EventHandler.Response: SLShipments.GeneratePickListTmpSp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessId), VAR 1, VAR C(PickListEdit), VAR C(CustNumVarEdit), VAR V(CustSeqVar), VAR V(WhseVar), VAR 1, VAR, VAR P(ParentContainerNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ProcessAddShipment
EventHandler.Response: SLPickLists.GenerateShipmentSP( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessId), VAR V(ShipLocVar), VAR , VAR , VAR , MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR PackConfirmation, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcePackageTree
Variable.Value: treecomp.singleobj( OBJ(SLShipments) LOADMETHOD(PackageLoadTreeLevelSp) LOADMETHODPARMS(VAR V(TempShipmentId), VAR S, VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR P) DISPLAY(2) PROPERTIES(ShipmentId, UbTreeDescription, UbPackageID, UbItem, UbType, UbLot) RECURSIVEMETHODPARMS(VAR TMP(PackageTree, 0), VAR TMP(PackageTree, 4), VAR TMP(PackageTree, 2), VAR TMP(PackageTree, 3), VAR TMP(PackageTree, 5), VAR P))

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcetree1
Variable.Value: treecomp.singleobj( OBJ(SLShipments) LOADMETHOD(PackageLoadTreeLevelSp) LOADMETHODPARMS(VAR ShipmentId, VAR Type, VAR PackageID, VAR Item, VAR Lot, VAR Process) DISPLAY(2) PROPERTIES(ShipmentId, TreeDescription, PackageID, Item, Type, Lot) RECURSIVEMETHODPARMS(VAR ShipmentId, VAR Type, VAR PackageID, VAR Item, VAR Lot, VAR Process))

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SLShipmentLines( CA() OBJNAME(SLShipmentLines1) FILTERPERM(ShipmentId=FV(TempShipmentId)) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC3
Variable.Value: OBJECT3( SLShipmentSeqs( CA(RVIO) OBJNAME(SLShipmentSeqs1) FILTERPERM(ShipmentId=FV(TempShipmentId) AND PickListId IS NOT NULL) UPD(GenerateTmpShipSeqSp('C(ProcessIdEdit)',UbSelect,ShipmentId,ShipmentLine,ShipmentSeq,'C(ShipmentItemsQtyEdit)',,Loc,Lot,QtyPicked,QtyShipped,PackageId,BYREF MESSAGE),REF) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC4
Variable.Value: OBJECT4( SLShipmentSeqSerials( CA(RI) OBJNAME(SLShipmentSeqSerials1) FILTERPERM(ShipmentId=FV(TempShipmentId) and PackageId=FV(TempPackageId2) and PackageId<>FV(Blank)) ORDERBY(CoItem, SerNum) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC5
Variable.Value: OBJECT5( SLShipmentPackages( CA(RNCSDVI) OBJNAME(SLShipmentPackages1) FILTERPERM(ShipmentId=FV(TempShipmentId) ) UPD(GenerateTmpShipSeqPackageWithFreightClassSp('C(ProcessIdEdit)',UbSelect,ShipmentId,PackageId,PackageType,RateCode,NMFC,Weight,Hazard,Description,MarksExcept,RefPackageId,TH_CartonPrefix,TH_Measurement,TH_CartonSize,FreightClass,MESSAGE),REF) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC6
Variable.Value: OBJECT6( SLShipmentSeqs( CA(R) OBJNAME(SLShipmentSeqs2) FILTERPERM(ShipmentId=FV(TempShipmentId) and PackageId=FV(TempPackageId2) and PackageId<>FV(Blank)) ) )

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: 'This will cause the PickListEdit combobox to reload the next time the user clicks on it.
If oPackageCollection.GetObjectProperty("UbSelect", i) = "1" And Not oPackageCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew Then
If oSerialCache.GetNumEntries >= qty And count <> qty Or (oSerialCache.GetNumEntries < qty And oSerialCache.GetNumEntries > count) Then
